html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D5.DT.Mumps contraindications decision table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Draft Medication Request ID for Mumps dose
Mumps vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required.
Mumps vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required. Guidance

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D5.DT.Mumps contraindications decision table in the Immunization CPG

Mumps vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required.
